About Us

Building the Future of Business Excellence

For over 15 years, Talent Centre has been the trusted advisory partner for organizations seeking transformative growth across Southern Africa.

Our Mission

Empowering Organizations to Thrive

Talent Centre was founded with a singular vision: to provide world-class consultancy services that enable organizations to navigate complexity, unlock potential, and achieve sustainable growth.

We combine deep industry expertise with innovative thinking to deliver advisory solutions that create measurable impact. Our approach is collaborative, results-driven, and tailored to each client's unique context and objectives.

Evidence-based strategic advisory
Measurable outcomes and ROI
Cross-sector expertise
Long-term partnership model

15+

Years Experience

200+

Clients Served

50+

Active Projects

88%

Satisfaction Rate

Leadership

Meet Our Leadership Team

Humphrey Chawafambira

Business Development Consultant & Founder

With over 23 years of experience in business development, organizational consulting, and strategic advisory, Humphrey has guided hundreds of organizations across Southern Africa toward sustainable growth. Industry experience spans government, corporate, SME, and NGO sectors, with a proven track record of delivering transformative outcomes. Main areas of expertise include training, coaching and mentoring, financial statements preparation and analysis, internal controls, internal audits, taxation, business planning and financial management.

Strategic PlanningBusiness DevelopmentOrganizational ChangeExecutive CoachingMentoringTraining

Tafadzwa Chawafambira

Financial Consultant

Tafadzwa brings extensive expertise in corporate finance and accounting, financial planning, and risk management. She partners with organizations to optimize their financial strategies, ensuring sustainable growth, robust financial health, and operational efficiency across both SME and corporate sectors by setting effective accounting systems and teams.

Corporate FinanceFinancial PlanningRisk ManagementOperational EfficiencyAccounting
Our Values

What Drives Us

Our core values guide every engagement and define the Talent Centre difference.

Excellence

Unwavering commitment to delivering the highest quality advisory services.

Partnership

We invest in long-term relationships, becoming an extension of your team.

Innovation

Forward-thinking solutions that anticipate market shifts and opportunities.

Integrity

Transparent, ethical consulting with your best interests at the core.

Our Journey

Milestones & Growth

2011

Founded

Talent Centre established in Gaborone, Botswana.

2016

Regional Expansion

Extended services across Southern Africa.

2018

100+ Clients

Reached a milestone of 100 corporate clients served.

2019

Training & Mentoring

Regional entrepreneurship training and mentoring.

2022

200+ Clients

Serving over 200 organizations across the region.

2024

Diversification

Diversified into other forms of business - transport and logistics exemplifying our entrepreneurial skills. We practice what we teach.
